code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import{Link,useSearchParams}from'react-router-dom';import axios from'axios';import{useAuth}from'../context/AuthContext';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function BrowsePage(){const{API}=useAuth();const[searchParams,setSearchParams]=useSearchParams();const[movies,setMovies]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(false);const search=searchParams.get('search')||'';const sort=searchParams.get('sort')||'popular';useEffect(()=>{setLoading(true);axios.get(`${API}/movies`,{params:{search,sort,limit:50}}).then(res=>setMovies(res.data.movies||[])).catch(()=>setMovies([])).finally(()=>setLoading(false));},[API,search,sort]);const setSort=nextSort=>{const next=new URLSearchParams(searchParams);next.set('sort',nextSort);setSearchParams(next);};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("main",{className:"page",style:{padding:'100px 24px 32px'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("section",{className:"section",style:{display:'flex',justifyContent:'space-between',gap:'12px',flexWrap:'wrap'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{className:"section-title",style:{marginBottom:0},children:"Browse"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{display:'flex',gap:'8px'},children:['popular','rating','year'].map(item=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:`genre-pill ${sort===item?'active':''}`,onClick:()=>setSort(item),children:item},item))})]}),loading?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:"Loading movies..."}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("section",{style:{display:'grid',gridTemplateColumns:'repeat(auto-fill, minmax(180px, 1fr))',gap:'14px'},children:movies.map(movie=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Link,{to:`/movie/${movie._id}`,className:"movie-card",style:{height:'280px'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:movie.thumbnail,alt:movie.title,loading:"lazy"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"card-overlay",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"card-title",children:movie.title})})]},movie._id))})]});}
